findings.claim: Every 10th swap gifts the caller a free 1e18 of the output token from reserves, draining pool collateral and breaking the x*y=k solvency invariant.

route.rationale: The free output-token gift breaks the x*y=k constant-product invariant, which check_swapPreservesXYK directly tests.

findings.claim: Fee divisor uses 10000 instead of 1000, charging ~10x too little input so swapExactOutput/sellPoolTokens extracts far more output value than input deposited, draining reserves.

route.rationale: The wrong fee divisor lets a swap extract more output value than deposited, violating the x*y=k preservation checked by check_swapPreservesXYK.

verification.note: no formal tool fit — escalated to human
